name: Afpa
message: The Afpa Group Since 1949, Afpa has been the leading organization for vocational training leading to qualifications. Its primary mission is to provide training for employment. Created to meet the needs of France in the midst of reconstruction, the National Association for Adult Vocational Training has been the National Agency for Adult Vocational Training since January 1, 2017. They became a victim of the data breach. 5TB sensitive and personal data will be published soon in our blog.
